creator: gehm@sudoers.net
text:
Strange. I am able to ping6 the host now. But svnlite does nothing (hangs)... and also a webbrowser pointed to 'https://svn.freebsd.org/base/releng/' (as long as it's ipv6)

Here some traceroutes....
